root_cause.summary: go-redis ginkgo test `PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage` failed in pubsub_test.go: the test subscribed to a Redis Pub/Sub channel and waited for a message via the read end of a buffered Go channel (`<-chan *redis.Message | len:0, cap:10`), but no message arrived within 1.001s and the test's gomega `Eventually(...).Should(Receive())` matcher timed out at pubsub_test.go:661. Ginkgo's failure block (L1102-1110) names the test, the test source line where the timeout fires (L661), and the failed channel state. Test runner summary at L1166-1172: `Summarizing 1 Failure: [FAIL] PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage pubsub_test.go:661 Ran 1224 of 1274 Specs in 179.248 seconds FAIL! -- 1223 Passed | 1 Failed | 0 Pending | 50 Skipped`. Likely cause: the redis-ce 8.4.x oldstable test server didn't deliver the published message within the 1s timeout — could be slow network setup or a transient redis-server flake under CI load. Package-level FAIL marker at L1331-1333 propagates to GHA exit code 2.

evidence_spans.reason: Self-contained failure block: `[FAILED] [1.014 seconds] PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage pubsub_test.go:645 [FAILED] Timed out after 1.001s. Expected <<-chan *redis.Message | len:0, cap:10>: 0xc0012d96c0 to receive something. In [It] at: pubsub_test.go:661`. Names the test, the test source line, the timeout duration, and the failed channel-receive state.

Test runner summary: `Summarizing 1 Failure: [FAIL] PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage pubsub_test.go:661`, `Ran 1224 of 1274 Specs in 179.248 seconds`, `FAIL! -- 1223 Passed | 1 Failed | 0 Pending | 50 Skipped`, `--- FAIL: TestGinkgoSuite (179.28s)`. Confirms scope (1 of 1274 specs failed).
Go package-level FAIL marker (`FAIL  github.com/redis/go-redis/v9  185.245s`) — confirms the package-level test exit code reflects the ginkgo suite failure.
